One click selects every ready connection and routes your system through them.

Scanning…
Advanced

Apps that ignore the system proxy can point at this SOCKS address directly.

ℹ︎
How merging works. Each app connection is sent over one link, and new connections are spread across your links — so many downloads, tabs and streams get the combined speed. A single download won't speed up, and there's no gain if your links share the same router or ISP. Use links on different networks (e.g. Wi‑Fi + phone USB).
